_meta.universe: R40 top-30 F&O by full-window (2024-01..2026-06) traded value
_meta.classification_source: NSE Industry/Sector classification (NIC) + index constituent membership; only indices with full 2022-2026 daily history in db/historify.duckdb are used
_meta.summary: 19 of 30 mapped to a real sectoral index; 11 fall back to broad_market NIFTY because no representative sectoral index exists in our data.
_meta.vs_r40: R40 hand-mapped only 14 (and JIOFIN was mis-tagged NIFTYPVTBANK). This map adds real sectors for RELIANCE, INFY, TCS, M&M, MARUTI, AXISBANK, INDUSINDBK, BSE, BAJFINANCE, DIXON and re-tags JIOFIN -> FINNIFTY.

RELIANCE.reason: RIL is the dominant (~30%) NIFTYOILANDGAS weight; tracks RIL more tightly than NIFTYENERGY

DIXON.reason: Consumer electronics / EMS - NSE Consumer Durables

BSE.reason: Stock exchange / capital markets = Financial Services

BAJFINANCE.reason: NBFC, top-3 NIFTY Financial Services constituent

JIOFIN.reason: Financial-services holding/NBFC (NOT a bank; R40 mis-tagged as NIFTYPVTBANK)

ETERNAL.reason: Internet/food-delivery (ex-Zomato) - no sectoral index in our data

BHARTIARTL.reason: Telecom - no NIFTY telecom index in our data

IDEA.reason: Telecom - no NIFTY telecom index in our data

LT.reason: Infra/capital goods - NIFTYINFRA absent from our data

HAL.reason: Defence PSU - no defence/PSE index in our data

MAZDOCK.reason: Defence shipbuilding PSU - no defence/PSE index in our data

BEL.reason: Defence electronics PSU - no defence/PSE index in our data

INDIGO.reason: Aviation - no transport/aviation index in our data

RVNL.reason: Railway/infra PSU - NIFTYINFRA absent; thematic, not in any available index

TRENT.reason: Apparel retail - no retail/consumption index in our data

IRFC.reason: Railway-finance PSU. By NIC it is Financial Services, but FINNIFTY is private-financial-heavy and a poor proxy for this PSU/railway-capex driven name; broad market is the more honest signal
